'''zazowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iwa|iwa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iwa|iwa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zazowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzeweth|zæzeweth]] || [[word:zæzewej|zæzewej]] || [[word:zæzewesh|zæzewesh]] || [[word:zæzewe|zæzewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazozowoth|zazozowoth]] || [[word:zazozowoj|zazozowoj]] || [[word:zazozowosh|zazozowosh]] || [[word:zazozowo|zazozowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazowoth|zazowoth]] || [[word:zazowoj|zazowoj]] || [[word:zazowosh|zazowosh]] || [[word:zazowo|zazowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazofwoth|zazofwoth]] || [[word:zazofwoj|zazofwoj]] || [[word:zazofwosh|zazofwosh]] || [[word:zazofwof|zazofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazowotho|zazowotho]] || [[word:zazowojo|zazowojo]] || [[word:zazowosho|zazowosho]] || [[word:zazowoko|zazowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazowoth|zazowoth]] || [[word:zazowoj|zazowoj]] || [[word:zazowosh|zazowosh]] || [[word:zazowo|zazowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazowothol|zazowothol]] || [[word:zazowojol|zazowojol]] || [[word:zazowoshol|zazowoshol]] || [[word:zazowokol|zazowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazowothotho|zazowothotho]] || [[word:zazowojojo|zazowojojo]] || [[word:zazowoshosho|zazowoshosho]] || [[word:zazowoko|zazowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazowothon|zazowothon]] || [[word:zazowojon|zazowojon]] || [[word:zazowoshon|zazowoshon]] || [[word:zazowokon|zazowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazowothoro|zazowothoro]] || [[word:zazowojoro|zazowojoro]] || [[word:zazowoshoro|zazowoshoro]] || [[word:zazowokoro|zazowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
